scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('www')) { fs.mkdirSync('www'); }; if (fs.existsSync('index.html')) { fs.copyFileSync('index.html', 'www/index.html'); console.log('Copied index.html to www/'); } else { console.log('Build directory verified.'); }" && node register-resources.js
